title: The White Cockatoo
writer: Ben Markson, Lillie Hayward, Mignon G. Eberhart
actors: Jean Muir, Ricardo Cortez, Ruth Donnelly
plot: Sue Tally waits for a brother she hasn't seen in twenty years to meet her in a French hotel. By proving her identity, she'll share in a $2,000,000 inheritance. But others are anxious to get a share of the money too, and won't stop...
